title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.395 - Prohibited crossing
text:
300.395.  Prohibited crossing. — 1.  Between adjacent intersections at which traffic control signals are in operation, pedestrians shall not cross at any place except in a crosswalk.
  2.  No pedestrian shall cross a roadway other than in a crosswalk in any business district.
  3.  No pedestrian shall cross a roadway other than in a crosswalk upon any street designated by ordinance.
  4.  No pedestrian shall cross a roadway intersection diagonally unless authorized by official traffic control devices; and, when authorized to cross diagonally, pedestrians shall cross only in accordance with the official traffic control devices pertaining to such crossing movements.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 86)
